summary: Created responsive application shell with Header (Open Hand branding), Nav (Home/Browse/Play/Guide links with aria-label and visible focus states), and Layout (CSS Grid shell with header/nav/main regions). Added CSS design tokens for colors, spacing, typography, and breakpoints. Updated App.tsx to use Layout shell and main.tsx to import tokens. No horizontal scrolling at any viewport. All 65 unit tests and 17 e2e tests pass across mobile (375px), tablet (768px), and desktop (1280px) viewports.
